name: Grinning Pugwampi
description:
Activate F (concentrate)

Trigger You damage an creature with the affixed weapon

This bone statuette of a sneering gremlin crumbles to dust when activated, imparting a fraction of its subject's infamous misfortune unto those you strike. The damaged creature must attempt a save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature must roll twice and take the worse result on the next check it attempts.

Failure The creature must roll twice and take the worse result on all checks until the end of its next turn.
